TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mb'ala Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko mb'ala a niyaro', 142 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 449 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 385 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 64 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal77%, Seediq5%, Bunun2%, Amis1%, Cou1%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mb~b~v °a…ĺa itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u mb~b~v °a…ĺa a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%. ira ko~u paisiŇčan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: mb'ala Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko mb'ala a niyaro', 142 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 449 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 385 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 64 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal77%, Seediq5%, Bunun2%, Amis1%, Cou1%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mb~b~v °a…ĺa itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u mb~b~v °a…ĺa a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%. ira ko~u paisiŇčan i nijaro~u °.
